name: Savory Apple Stuffed Pork Crown Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork crown roast with 1 tablespoon each of salt and pepper.
2. Place the roast, ribs down, onto a rack in a roasting pan and roast at 325°F for 2 hours.
3. In a Dutch oven, combine sugar and cranberries. Set aside.
4. Heat butter over medium heat. Add onion and celery to the hot butter. Stir and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the cranberry mixture, remaining salt and pepper, bread crumbs, apples, apple cider, beaten egg, and poultry seasoning into the Dutch oven. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and carefully remove the roast from the pan and rack. Drain drippings and set aside for another use.
7. Place the roast, ribs up, onto the rack in the roasting pan. Fill the center with the cranberry mixture.
8. Lightly cover the stuffing with a piece of foil and roast at 325°F for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and let rest for 15 minutes before serving hot.
